# Formance ledger-schema library

Single source of truth for Formance ledger-schema templates — chart of accounts,
Numscript transaction templates, and reusable queries. Consumed at build time by
the platform-ui **studio** gallery and the **docs** site (`<LedgerSchema schema="…"/>`).

Each template is a self-contained YAML file under [`schemas/`](./schemas) validated against
[`schemas/ledger-schema.schema.json`](./schemas/ledger-schema.schema.json). The filename equals
`meta.slug` and is the public lookup key — do not rename without updating consumers.

## Templates

| Template | Description | Tags |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [BNPL & Lending](./docs/bnpl-lending.md) | Installment plans, accrual, write-off, merchant settlement. | `bnpl` `lending` `collections` |
| [Card Issuing](./docs/card-issuing.md) | Auth-to-settlement lifecycle with a daily three-way match. | `cards` `issuing` `settlement` |
| [Crypto Custody](./docs/crypto-custody.md) | Multi-asset entitlements with on-chain reconciliation. | `crypto` `custody` `reconciliation` |
| [E-commerce Platform](./docs/ecommerce-platform.md) | Order capture, marketplace split, and seller payouts. | `ecommerce` `marketplace` `payouts` |
| [Issuing / Financial Host](./docs/issuing-financial-host.md) | Card issuing as a financial host: auth, settlement, and scheme position. | `issuing` `cards` `baas` |
| [Lending Platform](./docs/lending-platform.md) | Borrower principal and interest with lender funding pools. | `lending` `loans` `interest` |
| [Marketplace Payouts](./docs/marketplace-payouts.md) | Order split, seller balances, chargeback absorption. | `marketplace` `payouts` `chargebacks` |
| [Multi-currency Wallet](./docs/multi-currency-wallet.md) | Per-user multi-asset wallets with an exchange liquidity pool. | `wallet` `fx` `multi-currency` |
| [Neobank (FBO)](./docs/neobank-fbo.md) | Omnibus account, per-customer balances, daily FBO recon. | `neobank` `fbo` `reconciliation` |
| [Omnibus / FBO](./docs/omnibus.md) | Single omnibus bank account with per-client sub-balances. | `omnibus` `fbo` `banking` |
| [Payment Acceptance](./docs/payment-acceptance.md) | PSP capture, fees, and settlement into the merchant balance. | `payments` `acceptance` `psp` |
| [Rideshare (Tutorial)](./docs/rideshare-tutorial.md) | Tutorial marketplace: rider charge, driver earnings, platform fee. | `tutorial` `marketplace` `rideshare` |
| [Stablecoin Issuer](./docs/stablecoin-issuer.md) | Reserve-backed mint & redeem with a 1:1 parity proof. | `stablecoin` `mint-redeem` `reserves` |
| [Stablecoin Operations](./docs/stablecoin-operations.md) | Onramp/offramp business: PSP fiat ↔ stablecoin via pivot accounts, with circulation tracking. | `stablecoin` `onramp-offramp` `psp` |

## Tooling

- `pnpm validate` — validate every template against the canonical schema (CI gate).
- `pnpm render` — regenerate `docs/*.md` + this `README.md` (CI asserts no drift).
